item.title: Why Malaysia Must Use AI To Strengthen TB Control — Mohamad Arif Awang Nawi
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A USM senior lecturer urges Malaysia to use artificial intelligence to strengthen tuberculosis control. AI could detect TB earlier, predict hotspots, and improve treatment adherence, though challenges like fragmented data and limited capacity remain. The post Why Malaysia Must Use AI To Strengthen TB Control — Mohamad Arif Awang Nawi appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), who(+2), outbreak(+3), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Doctors’ Duty Of Care Is Not For Sale — Malaysian Medical Association
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
MMA warns doctors against leasing their credentialing privileges to aesthetic operators or prescribing Ozempic and Mounjaro for weight loss without proper assessment. Such practices breach medical ethics, risk patient harm, and undermine public trust. The post Doctors’ Duty Of Care Is Not For Sale — Malaysian Medical Association appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Teen Pregnancy Data Is Incomplete Without Abortion Figures — Dr SP Choong
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Dr SP Choong argues teen pregnancy data cited in a Ministry of Health report is misleading because it counts only hospital births, not abortions. He says the issue must also address access to safe, legal abortion and accurate information. The post Teen Pregnancy Data Is Incomplete Without Abortion Figures — Dr SP Choong appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Sugar, Instant Noodles Most Purchased Sara Items: MOF
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The top 5 most purchased items with Sara aid are mostly unhealthy or highly processed food: sugar, instant noodles (curry), cream crackers, instant noodles (fried), and eggs, based on MOF data. Fresh food inclusion under study due to barcode-based system. The post Sugar, Instant Noodles Most Purchased Sara Items: MOF appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Outpatient Overload: Can Private GPs Relieve Malaysia’s Public Hospitals? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Scaling GP responsibilities is feasible, but only with coordinated training pathways, regulatory recalibration, and performance-based contracting to maintain clinical governance standards nationwide. The post Outpatient Overload: Can Private GPs Relieve Malaysia’s Public Hospitals? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Protect Children From Attacks On Schools — Malaysian Paediatric Association
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The MPA urges the international community to move beyond words of sympathy and take decisive action to ensure that children everywhere are shielded from the horrors of war and violence. The post Protect Children From Attacks On Schools — Malaysian Paediatric Association appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: urgent(+3), law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: IJN First In Asia To Use New System To Treat Irregular Heart Rhythm
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
IJN is the first in Asia to use the Affera Prism-2 system to treat atrial fibrillation, allowing mapping and ablation in a single procedure. The national heart centre has treated 11 patients since February, mainly complex cases, with no complications reported. The post IJN First In Asia To Use New System To Treat Irregular Heart Rhythm appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: MOH Wants RM29m Additional Funding For Psoriasis Biologics
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
MOH spent RM17.35 million on psoriasis biologics in 2025, up 46.7 per cent from 2024, and plans to seek RM29 million more from MOF for six biologic medicines. Biologics are needed for a small group of patients with difficult-to-control disease. The post MOH Wants RM29m Additional Funding For Psoriasis Biologics appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A government doctor says FMS gazettement trainees juggle medical officer duties, clinics, and administrative work during a six-month training period. This appears specific to Family Medicine, as other specialties do not routinely undertake MO duties during gazettement. The post Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Chile becomes the first country in the Americas to be verified by WHO for the elimination of leprosy
item.description:
Source: WHO News (Global Health)
The World Health Organization (WHO), together with the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO), congratulates Chile for becoming the first country in the Americas – and the second globally – to be officially verified as having eliminated leprosy disease.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)
